allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/ingest/csv -H 'Authorization: Bearer bad-token' -F 'file=@/dev/null;filename=test.csv' -F roles=)
Bash(curl -si -X OPTIONS http://localhost:8000/ingest/csv -H 'Origin: http://localhost:3000' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Method: POST' -H 'Access-Control-Request-Headers: Authorization,Content-Type')
